package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for transaction_object_crosses_more_than_one_layer_boundary: Transaction handles passed through multiple layers as ordinary arguments.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule209NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule209NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule209NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario209Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule209NegativeService, input Rule209NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
